title: Record-Lifecycle Multi-Party Withdraw
description: EXT-35 fixture: multi-party workflow with `withdrawable.partyScope: all-parties-must-agree` per FW-0034 design §7.4. Exercises the case-level multi-party withdraw composition axis -- DISTINCT from FW-0050 §5.2 per-signature withdraw which is per-party always (substrate rule). The fixture stays minimal at the kernel layer (no `parties` block here -- that lives at EXT-28); this fixture pins the `partyScope` axis itself.
